description.value: You've attached a nervous system–integrated weapon mount to your LFAN that you can activate to efficiently fire an arc of electricity. This Semi-Autonomous LFAN Version Omega (or SALVO) deals @Damage[((max(7,ceil(@actor.level/2)))d4)[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC). After using SALVO, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Salvo]]{1d4 rounds}. At 15th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d4.
